'''zadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jealously|jealously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jealously|jealously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zadhate|zadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zadhatesher|zadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadhatesherĂ«m|zadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadhatero|zadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zadhateshĂ«|zadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadhateshĂ«m|zadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadhatero|gokizadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizadhateshĂ«|gokizadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadhateshĂ«m|gokizadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozadhankerom|gozadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozadhankeshĂ«|gozadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadhankeshĂ«m|gozadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozadhankeya|gozadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadhaterom|zadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadhatemu|zadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zadhateya|zadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadhaterom|gokizadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadhatemu|gokizadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizadhateya|gokizadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zadhadhate|zadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zadhadhatesher|zadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadhadhatesherĂ«m|zadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadhadhatero|zadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zadhadhateshĂ«|zadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadhadhateshĂ«m|zadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadhadhatero|gokizadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizadhadhateshĂ«|gokizadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadhadhateshĂ«m|gokizadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozadhadhankerom|gozadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozadhadhankeshĂ«|gozadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadhadhankeshĂ«m|gozadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozadhadhankeya|gozadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadhadhaterom|zadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadhadhatemu|zadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zadhadhateya|zadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadhadhaterom|gokizadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadhadhatemu|gokizadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizadhadhateya|gokizadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠte|zĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠtesher|zĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠtero|zĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokizĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠterom|zĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠtemu|zĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠdhĂŠteya|zĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokizĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokizĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafdhafte|zafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafdhaftesher|zafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafdhaftesherĂ«m|zafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafdhaftero|zafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafdhafteshĂ«|zafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafdhafteshĂ«m|zafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafdhaftero|gokizafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafdhafteshĂ«|gokizafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafdhafteshĂ«m|gokizafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafdhafnkerom|gozafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafdhafnkeshĂ«|gozafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gozafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafdhafnkeya|gozafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafdhafterom|zafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafdhaftemu|zafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafdhafteya|zafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafdhafterom|gokizafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafdhaftemu|gokizafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafdhafteya|gokizafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
